allow: PowerShell($now = Get-Date; $ampm = if \($now.Hour -lt 12\) { "오전" } else { "오후" }; $stamp = $now.ToString\("yyyy-MM-dd"\) + " " + $ampm + " " + $now.ToString\("hh:mm:ss"\); Write-Output "결과: -- Last Updated   : $stamp")
Bash(cd "/d/Games/World of Warcraft/_retail_/Interface/AddOns/MimDice/sounds" && ls -1 | grep -i "왜죽\\|왜 죽" 2>/dev/null; echo "---전체 mp3/ogg 목록---"; ls -1 *.mp3 *.ogg 2>/dev/null)
